subject: Young Saiyan warrior in a charging stance with green energy aura
description: A small humanoid figure with dark, spiky hair stands in a forward-leaning charge pose. The figure wears what appears to be a dark gi or combat outfit. A bright green-yellow energy aura surrounds the body and trails behind dynamically. The background is washed with green and yellow energy light. The figure's youth is legible from proportions — shorter stature, rounder face. Expression is not fully readable at this resolution but body language suggests a determined forward rush.
foreground: young dark-haired humanoid figure in dark gi, charging forward with energy aura
background: green and yellow energy wash, abstract light burst
